# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind Subscriptions Now Live via Stripe!
- Summary: Unlock Pro and Unlimited tiers with our new Stripe-hosted subscriptions. Enjoy seamless billing and membership management. Upgrade your CodeGrind experience today!
- Slug: stripe-subscriptions-live
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-stripe-subscriptions-live
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-23-stripe-subscriptions-live.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now offers Pro and Unlimited subscription tiers, integrated with Stripe for secure and convenient payment processing. Memberships are updated via webhooks, and users can access a self-serve billing portal.
- CTA: Upgrade to Pro or Unlimited today!
- Visual brief: A graphic showing the CodeGrind logo alongside the Stripe logo, with text highlighting 'Pro' and 'Unlimited' subscription tiers.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
